testcase.name: test_login_success

error.message: failed on setup with "AssertionError: Login failed: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_bug_fixes.py:31: in auth_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
